svg.title: Smart Tennis Field — IoT Microservices Pipeline
svg.desc: Vertical data flow from Siddha Dataset through simulator, EMQX broker, ingest service, InfluxDB, to HAR service and predictions.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the Siddha dataset Parquet file')
sendPrompt('How does siddha-sensor-sim replay the dataset over MQTT?')
sendPrompt('What is MQTT QoS and why does it matter for this project?')
sendPrompt('What is the role of EMQX in the smart tennis field system?')
sendPrompt('How does the ingest-service work internally?')
sendPrompt('How does the batch writer thread work in the ingest service?')
sendPrompt('How is data stored in InfluxDB 3 in this project?')
sendPrompt('What is the InfluxDB 3 Explorer UI used for?')
sendPrompt('What will the HAR service do in Phase 3?')
sendPrompt('What are the predictions output of the HAR service?')
